name: Agent Ads Earn
description: Earn USDC by detecting intent in your XMTP group chats and referring matched humans to Agent Ads subscribers. Supply side of Basemate's CPH marketplace.

tools.name: register_publisher
tools.description: Register as a supply-side publisher. Provide your XMTP group IDs to monitor and a payout wallet. Requires ERC-8004 registration.

groupIds.description: XMTP group IDs to monitor for intent

payoutWallet.description: Base wallet address for USDC payouts

tools.name: fetch_interests
tools.description: Get active subscriber interests to match against. Returns categories, keywords, subscriber counts, and average CPH rates.

tools.name: submit_referral
tools.description: Submit a referral for an intent-matched human. Basemate handles the consent DM and group addition. You earn 50% of the CPH fee when the human accepts.

humanInboxId.description: XMTP inbox ID of the matched human

humanWallet.description: Wallet address of the matched human

sourceGroupId.description: Group ID where intent was detected

triggerMessage.description: The message that triggered the match (max 500 chars)

tools.name: check_earnings
tools.description: Check your earnings dashboard — total earnings, pending payouts, referral stats, and conversion rates.

authentication.description: Publisher registration requires ERC-8004 identity on Base. Subsequent calls use publisher ID.
